form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when third (30.07) at big odds over 520m at Richmond. Nicely drawn on the inside but looks tested this line up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when third (30.07) at big odds over 520m at Richmond. Nicely drawn on the inside but looks tested this line up.

form.formComment: Good effort to score just six days ago over 440m at Goulburn by 3 lengths in a Maiden. Was strong in the market and scored a soft win most recently. Stay with her.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to score just six days ago over 440m at Goulburn by 3 lengths in a Maiden. Was strong in the market and scored a soft win most recently. Stay with her.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage seventh but before that won easily by 3.5 lengths at Nowra (29.64) beating Saja Boy in a Grade 5 on March 12. Others better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Got back last start and could only manage seventh but before that won easily by 3.5 lengths at Nowra (29.64) beating Saja Boy in a Grade 5 on March 12. Others better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the catching pen was hampered, became unbalanced and lost ground.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (23.51) at The Gardens in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 10 lengths. Has two successes and three minors from six starts from box 4. Looks suited here and can measure up on best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (23.51) at The Gardens in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 10 lengths. Has two successes and three minors from six starts from box 4. Looks suited here and can measure up on best.

form.formComment: Won her last two including a narrow win last start over 515m at The Gardens by a nose in a Grade 5. Form strong and a huge chance to register the hat-trick.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won her last two including a narrow win last start over 515m at The Gardens by a nose in a Grade 5. Form strong and a huge chance to register the hat-trick.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted wide across heels rounding the turn out of the front straight.

form.formComment: At the last outing finished 4th on April 6 over 365m at Nowra behind Unbothered beaten 9 lengths (21.18) in a Grade 5. Top-three hope with the right run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the start began awkwardly; Rounding the home turn came together.

form.formComment: Finished third last time (22.65) over 388m at Gosford. Wide draw here. Looking to others.
